message:
test(policy): add comprehensive tests for automation and SLB features

Add tests for:
- AutomationConfig defaults (auto_commit, auto_push, force_release)
- AutomationEnabled() helper function
- ForceReleasePolicy() with default and explicit values
- NeedsSLBApproval() for two-person approval detection
- Match.SLB flag propagation
- Policy.Validate() with valid and invalid inputs
- Policy CLI commands (show, validate, reset, edit, automation)
- generateDefaultPolicyYAML() content verification
- formatBool() and toRuleSummaries() helpers

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
